title: Courts debate, colleges mandate: The student perspective nobody is hearing
description: On May 26, 2026, the Supreme Court of India halted what was shaping up to be a quiet, long-overdue overhaul of Indian legal pedagogy. By staying a landmark direction of the Delhi High Court, which had ruled that law students cannot be barred from examinations or held back academically solely due to attendance shortages, the apex court firmly re-established a rigid, administrative status quo.During the hearing, the Bench expressed deep anxiety over increasingly empty law school classrooms. Justic
